---
name: New plugin proposal
about: Propose a new Double Commander plugin for this collection
title: "[plugin] "
labels: new-plugin
---

**Plugin type**
WLX (lister/viewer) · WCX (packer) · WDX (content) · WFX (file system)

**What it does**
One paragraph: the file type or task, and how it should behave in DC.

**Why it belongs here**
How it fits the collection's standard (native, universal, tested).

**Sketch of approach**
Key APIs / frameworks, rendering or processing strategy, open questions.
